summary: The diff shows significant implementation of backend data models, OTP authentication, and partial frontend implementations. However, the diff is heavily truncated, making it difficult to verify completeness of all requirements. Many frontend components and flows are referenced but not fully visible in the diff content.

missing_requirements.reason: App.tsx is modified but content is not shown in diff to verify if the directory page with all four launch buttons exists

missing_requirements.reason: Backend shows OTP storage and verification but no evidence of resend functionality or expiry handling logic

No evidence in diff of theme persistence mechanism across navigation

hallucinated_features.description: Stripe integration in backend with StripeConfiguration type and migration module
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest makes no mention of payment processing, Stripe integration, or payment configuration. Non-goals explicitly state no third-party services beyond Twilio for SMS
BuildRequest specifies four apps (Customer, Delivery, Restaurant, Admin). EmployeeApp appears to be a duplicate of DeliveryApp functionality not requested
